hero.label: Events in Morocco
hero.title: Refined Events, Beautifully Managed
hero.subtitle: We design elegant private and corporate events across Morocco with the same precision, style, and hospitality that define our weddings.

categoriesSection.label: What We Offer
categoriesSection.title: Event Categories
categoriesSection.subtitle: Positioned beyond weddings — crafted with the same precision, artistry, and hospitality.

categories.title: Engagement Parties
categories.desc: Celebrating your first steps into forever with intimate candlelit settings and bespoke Moroccan charm.
categories.detail: A beautifully hosted engagement celebration that sets the tone for everything to come — designed like an editorial moment, managed like a production.
highlights: Guest flow, timing, and on-site coordination

categories.title: Bridal Showers & Welcome Dinners
categories.desc: Elegant pre-wedding gatherings that set the tone for an unforgettable celebration ahead.
categories.detail: From refined bridal showers to welcome dinners in the Medina, we create warm, elevated moments that feel effortless for you and unforgettable for your guests.

categories.title: Anniversaries & Private Celebrations
categories.desc: Meaningful milestones marked with personalised design, exclusive venues, and heartfelt details.
categories.detail: Anniversaries, proposals, private dinners, and milestone moments — crafted with intimacy, beauty, and seamless execution across Morocco.

categories.title: Luxury Birthdays
categories.desc: From lavish rooftop parties to intimate desert dinners — milestones deserve a statement.
categories.detail: A luxury birthday should feel like a world of its own — whether it's a rooftop soirée, a villa party, or a desert celebration under the stars.

categories.title: Brand Experiences
categories.desc: Immersive brand activations and editorial productions set against Morocco's most stunning backdrops.
categories.detail: Premium brand activations, launches, dinners, and editorial productions — delivered with creative direction, technical precision, and impeccable guest experience.

categories.title: Corporate Gatherings
categories.desc: Prestigious corporate events, executive retreats, and galas delivered with precision and sophistication.
categories.detail: Corporate gatherings across Morocco — executive dinners, retreats, incentive experiences, and galas — planned with discretion, clarity, and polish.

promiseSection.title: Our Event Promise
promiseSection.subtitle: Three pillars that underpin every event we create in Morocco.

promises.title: Strategic Planning
promises.desc: From concept and budgeting to logistics and timeline — every detail is mapped out with precision before a single vendor is booked.

promises.title: Elevated Design
promises.desc: Editorial-quality styling, bespoke florals, atmospheric lighting, and curated entertainment that transforms any space.

promises.title: Seamless Guest Experience
promises.desc: Arrival management, hospitality programming, and on-the-day coordination so your guests experience nothing but joy.

formatsSection.label: Featured Formats
formatsSection.title: Featured Event Formats
formatsSection.subtitle: Our most-requested event settings — each one a world unto itself.

formats.title: Rooftop Dinners in Marrakech
formats.detail: Golden hour, lantern light, and a skyline dinner — elevated hospitality with an editorial Moroccan atmosphere.

formats.title: Garden Soirées
formats.detail: Lush greenery, layered florals, and refined dining — perfect for celebrations that feel romantic and timeless.

formats.title: Desert Experiences
formats.detail: A destination experience that becomes the story — sunset arrivals, luxury dining, and music under the stars.

formats.title: Intimate Private Receptions
formats.detail: A private celebration, perfectly choreographed — for smaller guest counts with exceptional design detail.

formats.title: Brand or Executive Dinners
formats.detail: High-level dinners for brands and executives — discreet, premium, and built around impeccable hospitality.

ctaSection.label: Let's Create
ctaSection.title: Plan Your Event
ctaSection.subtitle: Tell us about your occasion — we'll take care of everything else.
